text.fullText:
“I am a one truck owner and have deal with brokers for ALL of my work. Transparency in most of the information on loads is very important and FAIR. Brokers currently do not use point to point distance in order to pay on less mileage, they use zip code to zip code … why? They do not describe the product on occasions where they have something that drivers do not care to deal with. The load boards are FULL with very underpriced loads, it is disgusting.

Brokers make a living by sitting at their desks and making profit by underpaying the people who are doing the actual work! The working stiffs should be allowed to know what is going on with each load before we bid on it. What is it? What business is it going to? We need transparency!!!!”

Broker to over 45 days to pay carrier One truck operator like have to hire Factoring Companies to keep cash flow to manage expenses & they charge over 3% Plus Prime rate So carriers losing money to pay their Fee & Prime because broker took longer than 30 day & Broker didn’t pay us anything extra to take extra days to make payment.
Broker Carrier package are totally against Small feet companies & owner operator when we ask them questions they Blacklisted us or comments on Freight guard & That Put us out off business.
They are posting one load at several time even after booked to shop around when they book same load on cheaper Rate they just send email that load is canceled or Product not ready etc. if carrier cancel load for some reason they add comment on freight guard. Some shipper/Receiver charge lumper fee & broker made carrier to pay even they reimbursed still carrier lossing 3to 4% as factoring companies charge. They have all information about carrier now they require to Connect ELD when we call them to Confirm shippment they didn’t answer our call & made us to stay on line for over hour. Brokers are too strick for appointments if carrier didn’t make pickup/Drop on time they charge us. But when shipper/Receiver take while to load/offload they don’t pay us anything even we get their on time. They pay $150 for layover its nothing as compared to our Expense still carrier losing money. Some broker Discrimination according to State & Race . Need to fix minimum pay rate pr mile broker paying under $1 in some state & cities State like California have high tax & brower paying $1 to $1.50 how can we staying in business when broker keeping all the money to sit in their office. FMCA requires carriers to maintain all records & they don’t even audit brokers & they take advantage of this. All rule/law everything on Carrier & Drivers nothing on brokers. Need to balance this out.

I want Broker transparency.
